creator: nikola.lecic@anthesphoria.net
text:
The correct version follows:

--- m17n-db-1.5.5.diff,2 begins here ---
diff -Nur /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/Makefile /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/Makefile	2009-08-07 18:52:18.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/Makefile	2009-08-07 19:06:36.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	m17n-db
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.m17n.org/m17n-lib-download/:m17n \
 		http://anthesphoria.net/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/:m17n \
diff -Nur /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/distinfo /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/distinfo	2009-08-07 18:52:18.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/distinfo	2009-08-07 18:55:53.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
-MD5 (m17n-db-1.5.4.tar.gz) = c29db871d1e9c3cdde5891f1380c9eb2
-SHA256 (m17n-db-1.5.4.tar.gz) = ee8d9965068371136c91d3fedf6e493b565216c880b6fc06dc5e0e08a400097f
-SIZE (m17n-db-1.5.4.tar.gz) = 1323620
+MD5 (m17n-db-1.5.5.tar.gz) = a6fa9486caed6fe2a09d89fe97787696
+SHA256 (m17n-db-1.5.5.tar.gz) = 4f5bb75e3a0252a47b2628a09adf1ff16c4f160a38aea7ac394b74878ceed14f
+SIZE (m17n-db-1.5.5.tar.gz) = 1322255
 MD5 (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = bfdce99f82d6dbcb64b7f11c05d6bc96
 SHA256 (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = e73ff5eddea95d09238b41d3c9c4d9ccddcf99fcc93d04956599c91c704f4a8e
 SIZE (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = 14014977
diff -Nur /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/pkg-plist /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db.orig/pkg-plist	2009-08-07 18:52:18.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/pkg-plist	2009-08-07 19:02:35.000000000 +0200
@@ -366,7 +366,6 @@
 share/m17n/sa.lnm
 share/m17n/se.lnm
 share/m17n/si-samanala.mim
-share/m17n/si-wijesekera-preedit-alt.mim
 share/m17n/si-wijesekera-preedit.mim
 share/m17n/si-wijesekera.mim
 share/m17n/sid.lnm
--- m17n-db-1.5.5.diff,2 ends here ---
